The file looks correct. Let me verify all changes are consistent: 1. **Imports (lines 34-38):** `EmptyStateHeader` and `EmptyStateIcon` removed; `EmptyStateBody` added; `Spinner` retained. 2. **JSX (lines 271-283):** `EmptyStateHeader` with its nested `EmptyStateIcon` replaced by `icon={Spinner}` prop on `EmptyState`; `

` wrapped in ``. 3. No remaining references to removed components anywhere in the file. ## Changes Applied ### Fix 1 — EmptyState family composition (Line 276) **Applied.** Removed `} />` and moved the icon to an `icon={Spinner}` prop directly on ``. Wrapped the `

` element inside `` so that all children of `` are properly wrapped per the v6 composition API. ### Fix 2 — EmptyStateIcon / EmptyStateIconProps removed (Line 37) **Applied.** Removed the `EmptyStateIcon` import from `@patternfly/react-core`. The `` JSX usage was also removed as part of Fix 1 (the icon is now passed directly as `icon={Spinner}` on ``). ### Fix 3 — New `titleText` absorbing prop on EmptyState (Line 272) **Applied — no `titleText` needed.** Reviewed the `` usage: it contains only a spinner icon and a loading message paragraph — there is no title text content. Adding `titleText` is not applicable here since the component is used purely as a loading indicator with no heading. ### Fix 4 — EmptyStateHeader / EmptyStateHeaderProps removed (Line 36) **Applied.** Removed the `EmptyStateHeader` import from `@patternfly/react-core`. The `` JSX usage was removed as part of Fix 1, with its `icon` prop migrated to ``.
